session.user: Run `ruff check src/erk/tui/ packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/ packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_service/ tests/tui/test_run_table.py` and report all errors. This is read-only - just run and report results.
